title: Kerala High Court refuses to grant anticipatory bail to expelled Congress councillor accused of rape
description: The Kerala High Court on Tuesday refused to grant anticipatory bail to expelled Congress municipal councillor from Palakkad, Prashob MA, in a rape case [Prashob M v State of Kerala & anr].The case involves allegations that he sexually exploited a Dalit woman by promising her employment. He has been booked for rape related offences under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) as well as under the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989 (SC/ST Act).A Special SC/ST
